title: Schema v1 to v2 migration
description: Events at schema_version 1.0 should migrate to 2.0
clause: GA-05-REQ-01: v1_to_v2 MUST rename 'model' to 'model_id' and bump schema_version

title: Migration rehashes md5 checksums to sha256
description: v1_to_v2 must re-hash md5: prefixed checksums to sha256:
clause: GA-05-REQ-02: md5-prefixed checksums MUST be rehashed to SHA-256

title: Migration coerces tag values to strings
description: Non-string tag values must be coerced to string during migration
clause: GA-05-REQ-03: Tag values MUST be coerced to strings during migration
